items.caption_text:
Trent wasn’t always a retail giant…
It started as Lakme in 1952, and in 1998, Tata made a bold move, sold Lakme to HUL and entered retail with Westside.

That single decision changed everything.
From one brand to 1,200+ stores today, this is one of the most underrated transformation stories in Indian markets. 📊

👉 To know more, watch our full video on YouTube!
. 
.
.
.
#carachanaranade #stockmarket #trent #lakme #westside

items.caption_text:
Just a few hours left! 
Technical Analysis Using AI Batch 2 is all set to begin.

Technical Analysis is evolving and AI is transforming the game. 🚀

In this exclusive webinar, CA Rachana Ranade will share how to blend the power of AI with practical Technical Analysis to help you work smarter, faster, and in a more systematic way. 📈

Learn how AI can help you:
- Scan stocks intelligently
- Build a TA mentor for your setups
- Generate Buy/Sell signals on TradingView
- Use structured trendline logic & ATR-based risk management

If you know charts but struggle to apply them, or want to sharpen your edge, this session will change how you approach Technical Analysis.

⚠️Disclaimer: This webinar is recommended only for participants who have a basic understanding of Technical Analysis, such as reading candlesticks, chart patterns, and basic price action concepts.

🎯Secure your spot now: Link in bio 

Fees are not refundable. 
This webinar is for educational purposes only

#CARachanaRanade #Stockmarket #technicalanalysis #Webinar
